text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Big Brother... I just hurt myself a
little... Ow!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Don't worry, Big Sister... I just hurt myself a
little... Ow!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine. I won't let an injury like this stop me from
training.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Don't worry!
choice_data_list: I can't just not worry about you…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Don't worry!
choice_data_list: I can't just not worry about you…
I can't just not worry about you…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... I'm sorry…

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I just... wanted you to know that I can keep
working hard.
choice_data_list: I know. But keeping you safe is more important.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I just... wanted you to know that I can keep
working hard.
choice_data_list: I know. But keeping you safe is more important.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh… Thanks. In that case, I'll rest...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh… Thanks. In that case, I'll rest...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice needs to rest for a while to heal up. Her
injury is worse than we thought, and it will take
quite a while until she completely recovers.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Oh... Yeah, you're right...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I don't suppose there's any training I can do lying
down?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Like, maybe upper-body excer—
choice_data_list: It's fine. Just get some rest.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Okay... Sigh... Why do I always mess up like this?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower gets some proper rest, but it's a
while before she's back to normal.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But if I stop here, all the training I've done until
now will be for nothing.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I-I don't want that.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So please! Once I'm healed, you have to let me
start training right away!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
So please! Once I'm healed, you have to let me
start training right away!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower's eyes burn with determination. It
seems like she's gotten something out of this
situation.
